title: blob: download from blob URL with sha256 verification
description:
Implement blob download in blob.rs:
- GET {blobDownloadUrl} with blobId substituted
- Stream response to memory or file
- Verify sha256 of received bytes against known expected hash (from Message.attachments[].blobId metadata)
- Return ClientError::BlobVerificationFailed on mismatch
- Test: download fixture bytes from wiremock, assert sha256 matches

Note: blobDownloadUrl template from session object; substitute {blobId}, {type}, {name}
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
